scope_boundary: bounded non-core Project Theseus module definition-of-done gate import only

finite Lean bridge over summarized import facts
transition_reason: The imported sanitized gate run records a GREEN module definition-of-done result with 22 of 22 major module records ready, 0 hard gaps, 0 warnings, 20 source-backlog work cards, source/backlog route smoke passing, and explicit non-claims; the accepted transition is limited to the narrow import claim.
downgrade_triggers: source digest or reviewed summary changes without a refreshed import
raw private payload or private path is copied into the public fixture
module-card health is described as learned capability, model quality, deployment, or chapter-core support evidence
clean live Theseus replay is claimed from this dirty-checkout import
promotion_burden: A stronger claim would need a clean public Theseus replay or archived public fixture with environment notes, exact commands, published module-card artifacts, independent review, and no private-payload leakage.
limitations: The source checkout was dirty at import review.
The raw Project Theseus report, module cards, backlog rows, and private paths are not copied into this repository.

The import does not prove module capability, model quality, deployed Theseus behavior, clean live replay, or chapter-core support.
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; no independent external human review
non_claims: does not prove clean live Project Theseus replay.
Does not prove model quality, deployed Theseus behavior, module capability, benchmark performance, safety, alignment, transfer, deployment readiness, or ASI.

does not promote any chapter core claim above argument.
